name: Stingmon (Black)

signature_move.name: Spiking Finish
signature_move.description: Skewers the opponent with the spikes on both its arms, or hits them with a powerful flying kick.

description: Sorry, but no official profile of Stingmon (Black) has been added yet. The following text is just the blurb of St-769 . This nimble sky assassin is protected by its super-hard body! ⇨ English 超硬質ボディに守られた、俊敏なる空中殺法戦士！
